hero.name: GABRIEL FASOLIM
hero.subtitle: Mid-Level Full-Stack Developer · Fintech & Blockchain
hero.description: Architecting high-criticality financial systems with a focus on structural integrity and performance. I bridge the gap between complex backend logic and seamless frontend experiences.

descriptions: Designing transaction systems where latency and precision are non-negotiable. Building the future of digital assets.
Smart contract integration and decentralized architecture. Navigating the complexities of distributed ledgers.
Connecting the physical and digital worlds through robust real-time data processing and device management.

jobs.description: Leading the development of high-throughput trading platforms. Implementing microservices architecture for real-time order matching and portfolio management.
Engineered IoT gateway interfaces and real-time monitoring dashboards. Streamlined sensor data ingestion pipelines using NestJS and MQTT.
Contributed to the development of enterprise resource planning tools, focusing on financial modules and reporting systems using .NET/C#.

items.title: Systems Thinking
items.body: I don't just write code; I design systems. I consider how every component interacts within the larger architecture to ensure scalability and maintainability.

items.title: Financial Domain Knowledge
items.body: Deep understanding of ledger systems, transaction integrity, and compliance requirements in the Fintech sector.

items.title: Delivery Focus
items.body: Proven track record of meeting critical deadlines in high-pressure environments while maintaining code quality and system stability.

items.title: Full Ownership
items.body: Taking responsibility for the entire lifecycle of a feature—from initial requirement gathering to deployment and post-launch monitoring.

items.title: Academic Honors & Best TCC
items.body: Awarded for exceptional performance and the most outstanding final graduation project at PUCPR.

items.title: ICHILD
items.body: Architected the core system for a child welfare monitoring platform during a dedicated hackathon.

items.title: Agenda Hub
items.body: Developed a comprehensive scheduling engine used by multiple business units within an educational ecosystem.

items.title: Teaching Assistant
items.body: Mentored junior students in Algorithms and Data Structures, fostering a culture of technical excellence.
